# Radio

A radio button component with a corresponding `RadioGroup` container. Provides animated selection indicators and configurable color palettes.

## Import

```jsx
// Nested property pattern (recommended)
import { RadioGroup } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

// Usage: <RadioGroup.Item />, <RadioGroup.ItemIndicator />, etc.

// Named imports (backwards compatible)
import { Radio, RadioGroup } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Nested Property | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `RadioGroup` | - | The root wrapper that manages radio selection state |
| `Radio` / `RadioItem` | `RadioGroup.Item` | An individual radio option with built-in indicator and label |
| `RadioItemHiddenInput` | `RadioGroup.ItemHiddenInput` | Hidden input for form compatibility |
| `RadioItemIndicator` | `RadioGroup.ItemIndicator` | The visual radio indicator |
| `RadioItemText` | `RadioGroup.ItemText` | Label text for the radio option |

## RadioGroup Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | - | Controlled selected value |
| `defaultValue` | `string` | - | Initial selected value for uncontrolled usage |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the selected value changes |
| `name` | `string` | - | The `name` attribute for the radio group (for form submission) |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"primary"` | The color palette passed down to all child Radio items |
| `animated` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether to apply hover and selection animations |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Radio Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | **required** | The value of this radio option |
| `label` | `string` | - | Label text displayed next to the radio |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | - | Alternative to `label` for custom label content |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether this radio option is disabled |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"primary"` | The color palette (typically inherited from RadioGroup) |
| `animated` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether to apply animations (typically inherited from RadioGroup) |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the item element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
// Nested property pattern (recommended)
<RadioGroup defaultValue="option1">
  <RadioGroup.Item value="option1" label="Option 1" />
  <RadioGroup.Item value="option2" label="Option 2" />
  <RadioGroup.Item value="option3" label="Option 3" />
</RadioGroup>

// Named imports (backwards compatible)
<RadioGroup defaultValue="option1">
  <Radio value="option1" label="Option 1" />
  <Radio value="option2" label="Option 2" />
  <Radio value="option3" label="Option 3" />
</RadioGroup>
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [value, setValue] = useState("apple");

<RadioGroup value={value} onValueChange={(e) => setValue(e.value)}>
  <RadioGroup.Item value="apple" label="Apple" />
  <RadioGroup.Item value="banana" label="Banana" />
  <RadioGroup.Item value="cherry" label="Cherry" />
</RadioGroup>
```

### With color palette

```jsx
<RadioGroup colorPalette="green" defaultValue="yes">
  <RadioGroup.Item value="yes" label="Yes" />
  <RadioGroup.Item value="no" label="No" />
</RadioGroup>
```

### With disabled option

```jsx
<RadioGroup defaultValue="active">
  <RadioGroup.Item value="active" label="Active" />
  <RadioGroup.Item value="disabled" label="Disabled option" disabled />
  <RadioGroup.Item value="other" label="Other" />
</RadioGroup>
```

### Custom composition with sub-components

```jsx
<RadioGroup defaultValue="custom">
  <RadioGroup.Item value="custom">
    <RadioGroup.ItemHiddenInput />
    <RadioGroup.ItemIndicator />
    <RadioGroup.ItemText>Custom Radio with Manual Composition</RadioGroup.ItemText>
  </RadioGroup.Item>
</RadioGroup>
```

## Features

- RadioGroup automatically passes `colorPalette` and `animated` props to child Radio/RadioGroup.Item components
- Pop animation on selection for tactile feedback
- Scale-up animation on hover
- Hidden input element for form compatibility
- Supports both controlled and uncontrolled usage
- Forwards refs on both RadioGroup and Radio/RadioGroup.Item
- Nested property pattern for better component discovery
- Full backwards compatibility with named imports
